titleStmt.title: SII 22.90: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 90. (A.R. No. 90 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. RĀJARĀJADĒVA—16th YEAR.

summary.p: The details of date are given as Tulā, śu. 10, Sunday, Svāti which yield the equivalent A.D. 1232, Octr. 24. The Nakshatra was Śadayam on this date. The inscription is built in at the beginning of the lines. It records a gift of 500 kuḻi of land at Tamiṭṭanallūr in Meykuṉṟa-nāḍu belonging to Vāṇavichchādaravēḷāṉ, as tax-free dēvadāna for the requirements of offerings to goddess Tirukkāmakkōṭṭattu-Aḻagiyanāchchiyār in the temple of Tāṉtōṉṟi-Āḷuḍaiyanāyanār at Śeṇbai alias Vīrarājēndraśōḻapuram in Vāṇagōppāḍi-nāḍu by Marundāḻvāṉāyaṉ [of Pērāyūr ?].

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrājarājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum dacamiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ peṇṇai vaṭakarai vāṇakoppāṭināṭṭuc ceṇpaiyāṉa virarājentiracoḻapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruttāṉtoṉṟi Āḷuṭaiyanāyaṉār tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu Aḻakiyanācciyārkkut tiruvamutu kaṟiyamutu tirumeyppūccu kuṟaipaṭāmalc ceyya perāyūruṭaiyāṉ
trayaṉeṉ peṇṇait teṉkarai meykuṉṟa nāṭṭut tamiṭṭanallūr vāṇaviccātiraveḷāṉ taṉmappaṭṭiyil viṭṭakuḻi Aiñūṟum candrādittavarai Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka viṭṭeṉ maruntāḻvāṉāyaṉeṉ Itu māṟuvāṉ Eḻānarakattiṟ kiḻānarakam pukuvāṉ paṉmāheśvarar Irakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.90 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
